decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-25; not derived from any existing repository.
acceptance_criteria: Parsing is case-insensitive, so 'TRUE' and 'True' both work.
Surrounding whitespace is ignored, so ' yes ' parses.
true, yes, 1, on parse to True; false, no, 0, off parse to False.
